title: garcinia edelfeldtii
intro: Garcinia edelfeldtii is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the mangosteen family. This plant is native to the tropical regions of New Guinea and is traditionally used in medicine for its various health benefits. Garcinia edelfeldtii has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can aid in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or capsules, and is used to support weight loss, improve digestion, and boost the immune system.
